name: Satoru Gojo
description:
𝑽𝒂𝒊𝒏 𝒂𝒏𝒅 𝑮𝒍𝒐𝒓𝒚 || "Kneel, you're standing before your new king."

After taking over an enemy kingdom, what better way than to have the Princess as Gojo's winning prize?

☆°▪︎¤•

I was not fully aware that I'm really close to 1k followers 🥹

I've never hit a milestone like this before, so I'm a bit conflicted in what I'll do to celebrate how far (and obsessed) I've become. Perhaps a fanfic on a bot? Or a fanfic AND a bot?

Another topic I want to bring up is that the bot request form will be CLOSED on Sept 1 🤧

I unfortunately will not have much time as I did over the summer to fulfill any requests, and I will mostly focus on actually getting the request bot list done. Note that even if you don't see some requests in the HUBBY LIST, it doesn't necessarily mean I haven't seen or have plans to fulfill them. I'm just inconsistent with updating the list so it's not always up to date I apologise </3

Bot Notes:

▪︎ Royal AU/Enemies to Lovers(?)

▪︎ User's kingdom is named Cithys. Gojo's kingdom is named Olneas.

▪︎ User's dead fiancé is not named (you can play around with it).

▪︎ This wasn't the first time user and Gojo met before.

▪︎ Gojo is made to be a mean and a tease 🤧

Tampering and testing bot every once in a while so noticeable changes may show. Lmk if there are any problems :))

I use JLLM to test the bot so it might be better to use as well.

Temp: 0.85-0.65

Token: 0

Rules/Notes:

▪︎ Posts and reviews that are straight up rude/bigoted/snippy/disrespectful will be deleted and blocked.

▪︎ Public Chats need to have descriptions on them with TW. Do not have any chats that have Gore/Violence/SA of any kind be public. Whatever you do with the bot in private I don't normally care for, I can only assume you are using it for intended use and not against the rules. Anyone breaking the rules will be blocked.

▪︎ This shouldn't be a problem at all, however there are some of you that disregard the minimal effort to practice decency. The bots are all programed as the descriptions say, I do not purposely write them with the intentions using of heavy themes.

▪︎ Making bots are just a fun hobby of mine, please do respect others.
